required_skills: Learning Objectives Writing using Bloom's Taxonomy
Storyboarding and Script Writing for eLearning modules
preferred_skills: Video-based learning and micro-learning module design
Learner persona development and UX research for education
Accessibility and WCAG 2.1 compliance for digital learning content
Data analytics for learning effectiveness measurement
Voice-over scripting and audio production coordination
responsibilities: Design and develop end-to-end eLearning courses using ADDIE and SAM models aligned with defined learning outcomes
Write detailed instructional storyboards, learner-facing scripts, and facilitator guides for multimedia learning modules
Collaborate with subject matter experts (SMEs) to extract, validate, and structure complex content into pedagogically sound learning experiences
Build interactive assessments, quizzes, and scenario-based exercises that measure learner comprehension and skill acquisition
Develop curriculum maps and course blueprints that sequence learning objectives using Bloom's Taxonomy across cognitive levels
Manage content publishing and version control on LMS platforms such as Moodle or Canvas, ensuring SCORM/xAPI compliance
Conduct formative and summative evaluations of learning programs using Kirkpatrick's Model to drive iterative content improvements
Apply Universal Design for Learning (UDL) principles to ensure all course materials are accessible and inclusive for diverse learner populations
Lead quality assurance reviews of all instructional materials, ensuring accuracy, consistency, and alignment with brand and pedagogical standards
Analyze LMS learner data and engagement metrics to identify content gaps and optimize course completion and satisfaction rates
